suppress.notes: spring-boot-devtools 4.0.6. CVE targets Spring Tools 4 for Eclipse / STS IDE (RCE) -- false match against the devtools runtime artifact, which is developmentOnly and never in the prod jar. Review 2026-08-22.
opentelemetry-semconv 1.37.0. CVE is OpenTelemetry-Go (Go language) -- false match against the Java artifact, not applicable. Review 2026-08-22.
opentelemetry-semconv 1.37.0. OpenTelemetry-Go CVE, false match against the Java artifact. Not applicable. Review 2026-08-22.
opentelemetry-semconv 1.37.0. OpenTelemetry-Go CVE, false match against the Java artifact. Not applicable. Review 2026-08-22.
swagger-ui 5.32.2 (bundled Swagger UI assets, dev-facing docs page). DOMPurify XSS. Accepted: the docs UI is not a data path; review 2026-08-22.
swagger-ui 5.32.2 (bundled Swagger UI assets). DOMPurify XSS. Accepted: docs UI, not a data path; review 2026-08-22.
swagger-ui 5.32.2 (bundled DOMPurify in Swagger UI). XSS sanitizer bypass. Accepted: docs UI, not a data path; review 2026-08-22.
tomcat-embed-core 11.0.21. Resource-exhaustion DoS (allocation without limits). Upgrades with the next Spring Boot patch. Review 2026-08-22.
tomcat-embed-core 11.0.21. Improper input validation. Upgrades with the next Spring Boot patch. Review 2026-08-22.
tomcat-embed-core 11.0.21. WebSocket: HTTP Authorization header exposed to unexpected hosts. Upgrades with the next Spring Boot patch. Review 2026-08-22.
tomcat-embed-core 11.0.21. Digest-authentication bypass (deprecated auth scheme; not used here). Upgrades with the next Spring Boot patch. Review 2026-08-22.
tomcat-embed-core 11.0.21. LockOutRealm case-sensitivity (LockOutRealm not used here). Upgrades with the next Spring Boot patch. Review 2026-08-22.
tomcat-embed-core 11.0.21. AJP secret timing discrepancy (AJP connector not enabled here). Upgrades with the next Spring Boot patch. Review 2026-08-22.
tomcat-embed-core 11.0.21. Authorization bypass with multiple servlet method constraints. Upgrades with the next Spring Boot patch. Review 2026-08-22.
postgresql 42.7.10 (pgjdbc driver). Driver-level vulnerability. Upgrades with the next Spring Boot patch. Review 2026-08-22.
Not currently flagged by NVD; retained from the 2026-05-22 baseline. Review 2026-08-22.
Not currently flagged by NVD; retained from the 2026-05-22 baseline. Review 2026-08-22.
